title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
